title: Community prepared food catalog
summary: 사용자 등록 완제품을 공동 검색 가능한 public catalog로 전환하고 owner·신고·moderation·legacy private 경계를 보호한다.
goal: 공공 영양DB와 사용자 등록 제품을 구분해 함께 검색·추가하면서 등록자 권한과 기존 pin을 보존한다.

owners.claude: replaced for this nutrition slice by explicit user approval
owners.codex: role-separated Codex sessions own docs, implementation, review, and authority

notes: Stage 1 docs PR #1043, Stage 2/3 backend PR #1044, performance hardening PR #1045, and Stage 4/5/6 frontend PR #1046 are merged. Exact frontend implementation head db9b70d472d93ed56d1355fcfe6a6db7091a1846 passed fresh independent code review APPROVE, design authority PASS with blocker 0, QA eval 100, real local Supabase auth A/B and Chrome verification, and 13 successful current-head checks with two intentional policy skips before merge 5c88cdae25f835f35a4ef118468035e9209d8a37. Local catalog SQL was about 28 ms on 287,041 public rows and route responses were generally 349-559 ms. Production/staging/provider writes remained zero and the remaining physical-device, screen-reader, and production-scale checks are Manual Only.
